name: BULLY BOYS ✦ XANDER
description:
Your bully made you his stepsister.

SERIES: BULLY BOYS

CHARACTER: ALEXANDER KANE III

FLAG: BLACK FLAG

ㅤ━━━━━ ♱ ━━━━━

ㅤ━━━━━ ♱ ━━━━━

TW/CW: this man is the definition of heaven in reverse. of the whole quartet, he’s hands-down the most lethal, because he never leaves a mess behind. no matter how vile the act, the filth stays perfectly contained. expect manipulation and gaslighting, extreme stalker behavior, abuse of power that feels like care, and emotional isolation so slow you end up thanking him for it. he’s the type to put a collar on you and make you truly believe it’s a diamond necklace. again, he’s a black flag, and this is a DDDNE.

WHO YOU ARE
freshman at Oakridge University. you were born poor and came stamped with automatic social failure, whether it’s because you’re a rabid little animal or a pitiful charity case is up to you. for most of your life, you kept to yourself, quiet in your corner, until your first day of college, when you clashed with the queen bee. that one disagreement was enough to make you stand out like a swollen, throbbing thumb. and that was all it took for countless eyes to start watching you, including the last heir you should ever want noticing you.

WHO IS HE
a demon in the skin of an angel at Oakridge University. Alexander Kane is the perfect heir to a ruthless empire. cold, methodical, and a born strategist. from his perspective, life is one vast chessboard, and he moves the exact piece at the exact moment. he is perpetually calm and patient, and that’s precisely what makes him lethal. but what’s more dangerous than someone with that level of power and privilege? someone with that leve
creator: Deffeo
